summary: A recorded Fox News broadcast of a White House Cabinet meeting, posted by DHS. The footage shows President Trump seated at the center of the Cabinet Room table speaking, flanked by cabinet members including a man seated to his right and others around the table, with American flags and military service flags behind them. A 'THE WHITE HOUSE LIVE' bug sits in the upper left and a lower-third chyron reads 'NOW: CABINET MEETS AMID IRAN CONFLICT, SHUTDOWN' beneath a red FOX NEWS ALERT banner. The narration concerns the government shutdown and its effect on DHS and travelers. The audio is broadcast speech.

script.scene: Wide shot of the White House Cabinet Room: President Trump at center, a man in a dark suit seated to his right, other cabinet members at the table, flags behind. Chyron: 'NOW: CABINET MEETS AMID IRAN CONFLICT, SHUTDOWN'.
Tighter shot of President Trump speaking at the table, flags behind him. 'THE WHITE HOUSE LIVE' bug upper left; FOX NEWS ALERT banner along the bottom.
President Trump continues speaking, looking down at papers on the table. Same chyron and alert banner.

notable_text: THE WHITE HOUSE LIVE; NOW: CABINET MEETS AMID IRAN CONFLICT, SHUTDOWN; FOX NEWS ALERT
